title: The Day You Begin
reason: Fosters a sense of belonging and invites students to share their stories.

title: Last Stop on Market Street
reason: Great for discussions around empathy and noticing beauty in everyday life.

title: Ada Twist, Scientist
reason: Supports inquiry-based learning and perseverance during experiments.

title: Those Shoes
reason: Pairs well with needs vs. wants lessons and SEL conversations about peer pressure.

title: The Proudest Blue
reason: Strong tie to identity, confidence, and respecting cultural expression.

title: Each Kindness
reason: Illustrates the consequences of unkind choices and the importance of compassion.

title: We Are Water Protectors
reason: Highlights environmental stewardship and civic engagement.

title: Thank You, Omu!
reason: Celebrates generosity and reciprocity in a neighborhood community.
